techcrunch.title: Cisco cuts nearly 4,000 jobs to spend more on AI, reports ‘record quarterly revenue’
techcrunch.summary: This is Cisco's latest layoff in recent years, while the company's chief executive touts record revenue and growth.

techcrunch.title: Two weeks left: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close May 27
techcrunch.summary: Your shot at VC access, global visibility, TechCrunch coverage, and $100K equity-free funding is running out. Deadline to apply is May 27. Apply now.

techcrunch.title: Wirestock raises $23M to supply creative multi-modal data to AI labs
techcrunch.summary: Wirestock has over 700,000 creators on its platform, which supplies photos, videos and 3D content to AI labs.

techcrunch.title: Who decides what AI tells you? Campbell Brown, once Meta’s news chief, has thoughts
techcrunch.summary: "The conversation is sort of happening in Silicon Valley around one thing, and a totally different conversation is happening among consumers."

techcrunch.title: Clio’s $500M milestone arrives just as Anthropic ups the ante
techcrunch.summary: Legal tech startups, including Clio, which just hit $500 million in ARR, are seeing massive customer adoption.

techcrunch.title: Notion just turned its workspace into a hub for AI agents
techcrunch.summary: Notion’s new developer platform lets teams connect AI agents, external data sources, and custom code directly into their workspace as the company pushes deeper into agentic productivity software.

techcrunch.title: Musk’s xAI is running nearly 50 gas turbines unchecked at its Mississippi data center
techcrunch.summary: Gas turbines at xAI's Colossus 2 data center have drawn a lawsuit over the company's use of "mobile" gas turbines as power plants.

techcrunch.title: Anthropic’s Cat Wu says that, in the future, AI will anticipate your needs before you know what they are
techcrunch.summary: The head of product for Claude Code and Cowork says that the next big step for AI is proactivity.

techcrunch.title: Who trusts Sam Altman?
techcrunch.summary: "I believe I am an honest and trustworthy businessperson," Altman testified in federal court.

techcrunch.title: Origin Lab raises $8M to help video game companies sell data to world-model builders
techcrunch.summary: Origin Lab will serve as a marketplace where AI labs can buy high-quality licensed data, and video-game companies can sell it.
